item.title: Learn How To Do Flawless Makeup With These Simple Steps
item.description: If you are a beginner and would like the learn the basics of how to do flawless makeup in just a few simple steps, then this tutorial is for you! I have provided a step by step illustration with several tips and tricks, product suggestions with drugstore options. This is a very beginner friendly tutorial

media:content.media:title: Learn How To Do Flawless Makeup With These Simple Steps
media:content.media:description: If you are a beginner and would like the learn the basics of how to do flawless makeup in just a few simple steps, then this tutorial is for you! I have provided a step by step illustration with several tips and tricks, product suggestions with drugstore options. This is a very beginner friendly tutorial

item.title: A simple trick for a sharper wing
item.description: This is my personal favorite way to keep a wing sharp. Leave a small gap at the lash line so your liner hits skin, not glitter!

media:content.media:title: A simple trick for a sharper wing
media:content.media:description: This is my personal favorite way to keep a wing sharp. Leave a small gap at the lash line so your liner hits skin, not glitter!
